components.content:
• The Pricing Calculator for AWS Backup only provides estimates for storage costs in standard backup vaults. Data transfers, restores, Backup Audit Manager reports, GET requests, etc are not included in the Pricing Calculator’s estimates. Please refer to AWS Backup’s pricing page for more details.
  • The Pricing Calculator presents a single monthly cost representing an average month during the first year of usage. In practice, costs may change each month due to 1) annual growth rate of protected data, and 2) a 'ramp-up' period during onboarding where new backups are being created but none have started deleting or transitioning to cold storage yet.
  • While cross-region copy and cross-account copy are not directly supported by the pricing calculator, we recommend creating a separate estimate for each backup copy. Your total storage costs will be the sum of the estimates. Logically air-gapped (LAG) vaults are not natively supported in the Pricing Calculator today, but note that backup copies stored in LAG vaults are charged at a 15% premium to storage in standard vaults.
  • If you have a backup plan with multiple rules and the time frames of the two rules overlap, AWS Backup optimizes the backup and takes a backup for the rule with the longer retention time. The Pricing Calculator captures this cost optimization for storage equal to the first full backup, however it currently does not currently capture storage optimizations for subsequent incremental backups so your actual costs may vary from the estimates.
  • Any backups in cold storage must be retained in cold storage for at least 90 days. If you delete backups prior to the 90-day minimum, you will be subject to early deletion charges equal to the costs that would have accumulated over the required 90 days. To use cold storage, the backup plan (frequency) must also have at least 1 day of warm storage retention. As the calculator only prices estimates for the first year of usage, the days in warm storage and days in cold storage combined must not exceed 365 days.
  • AWS Backup supports incremental backup for select resource types. Please refer to the AWS Backup documentation for more details. For more information on your cost estimates for AWS Backup, please contact AWS Sales Support.
